creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218419
net-mgmt/zabbix5-server: Update to 5.0.4

Hi,

please find the patch attached.

* New features:
  - Added Windows service support for Zabbix agent 2
  - Added Oracle Database plugin
  - Added GetHeaders method to CurlHttpRequest javascript object
  - Added SysAid media type
  - Added diaginfo runtime command to log internal diagnostic information
  - Added Host context menu to hosts listed on 'Web monitoring' page
  - Added SolarWinds Service Desk webhook
  - Added media "TOPdesk"
  - Added LLD rules for stand-alone and CAPsMAN APs
  - Added iLert media type

* Bug Fixes:
  - Fixed ZabbixWeb Test Item for Admin is not working
  - Fixed minor template issues to follow guidelines
  - Fixed documentation for Agent2 PersistentBuffer
  - Updated VMware template to follow guidelines
  - Fixed fping interval detection, added log prints of detected options in
    debug mode, re-detect options every hour
  - Removed media_jira_with_CF_example.xml and moved example with custom
    fields example to readme
  - Added support of single-select, checkbox and radio button customfield
    types and "__zbx" tag filter for labels in Jira webhook
  - Add help flag to Zabbix Agent 2
  - Fixed HTTP agent JSON output when using HTTP/2
  - Fixed incorrect housekeeping form behaviour
  - Fixed filter block in lld overrides popup
  - Fixed oracle errors for host macro updates when linking templates
  - Increased age and duration related macro resolution to seconds
  - Fixed incorrect selected menu option for template screens page
  - Added runtime command diaginfo option to command line help messages
  - Changed link to "Web monitoring" page in context menu with filtering parameters
  - Fixed LLD override for applications
  - Added check of required cache size for vmware event messages
  - Fixed SSH monitoring when compiled with libssh; thanks to MATSUDA Daiki for the patch
  - Fixed Agent2 user-defined parameter key testing
  - Fixed description of URI field in Template DB MySQL by Zabbix agent 2
  - Fixed using outdated dynamic host when editing dynamic widgets on dashboard
  - Fixed performance of the "Latest data" screen with partitioned history tables
  - Enabled Memcached and MySQL plugins for Windows
  - Added non-trigger event types support to webhooks
  - Removed triggers for items Log growths, Log shrinks for MSSQL ODBC template
  - Fixed russian character in setup section and templates for Oracle ODBC and PostgreSQL agent2
  - Fixed unresolved macros in item names in data overview table
  - Changed log level increase command for Agent 2 to match Agent 1
  - Added support of ipv6 and unix sockets for memcached plugin
  - Fixed crash when performing housekeeping with disabled value cache
  - Fixed undefined index when importing host with non-existing interface
  - Updated JMX template to follow guidelines
  - Added overriding of triggers for IPMI Threshold sensors discovery
  - Changed Opsgenie media to handle extra options Tags and Teams
  - Removed proxy name from host breadcrumbs
  - Added new default item keys for item type "Zabbix aggregate"
  - Fixed discovered host group prototype saving during import
  - Fixed column sizes and paddings for items in graph edit form
  - Fixed incorrect copying of severeties in Problem widgets
  - Fixed SNMP type item test form not sending and resolving interface macros
  - Fixed displaying negative time in convertUnitsS() function
  - Fixed host connection macro in Slack media type
  - Fixed Oracle ODBC Template issues
  - Fixed Discord API version in Discord media type
  - Fixed compression availability not being checked when deleting history
  - Fixed Discord endpoint validation
